title: ardisia nigrescens subsp. donnell-smithii
intro: Ardisia nigrescens subsp. donnell-smithii, also known as the Mexican ardisia, is a plant species within the Ardisia genus, belonging to the Myrsinaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ardisia nigrescens subsp. donnell-smithii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
